title: Assertion `0' failed in  sqlite3IsLikeFunction
description:
yongheng added on 2020-01-22 21:49:06:
Consider the following test case:
---
create table a(b);
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM a WHERE x(1);
---

It triggers assertion in debug build of latest chunk.
drh added on 2020-01-22 23:13:45:
Notes:
This only comes up when compiled with -DSQLITE_ENABLE_UNKNOWN_SQL_FUNCTION
This only comes up when compiled with -DSQLITE_DEBUG.  Release builds are
     unaffected.
SQLite functions correctly, exhibits no UB, and gives the correct answer
     if the assert() is simply removed.
The resolution was to fix the assert() so that it works correctly even if
     -DSQLITE_ENABLE_UNKNOWN_SQL_FUNCTION is defined.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL);
key_bug_features: EXPLAIN SELECT with unknown SQL function causes assertion failure
